cards.front: What is the Chalk and Talk method in teaching?
cards.back: A traditional teaching method where the teacher writes or draws on a blackboard and explains concepts to students
A presentation software used to create visually appealing slides with text, images, and other multimedia elements

cards.front: What is the main advantage of using PowerPoint Presentation in teaching?
cards.back: It allows for easy organization and presentation of complex information, making it engaging for students

cards.front: What is the Chalk and Talk method's limitation?
cards.back: It can be time-consuming and may not be effective for students who learn visually or prefer interactive learning

cards.front: What is the role of the teacher in a PowerPoint Presentation teaching method?
cards.back: The teacher provides guidance and support, while students work individually or in groups to complete the presentation
